module_info.docstring:
Tests for MEDIA tag extraction from tool results.

Verifies that MEDIA tags (e.g., from TTS tool) are only extracted from
messages in the CURRENT turn, not from the full conversation history.
This prevents voice messages from accumulating and being sent multiple
times per reply. (Regression test for #160)

classes.name: TestMediaExtraction
classes.docstring: Tests for MEDIA tag extraction from tool results.

methods.name: test_media_tags_not_extracted_from_history
methods.docstring: MEDIA tags from previous turns should NOT be extracted again.

methods.name: test_media_tags_extracted_from_current_turn
methods.docstring: MEDIA tags from the current turn SHOULD be extracted.

methods.name: test_multiple_tts_calls_in_history_not_accumulated
methods.docstring: Multiple TTS calls in history should NOT accumulate in new responses.

methods.name: test_deduplication_within_current_turn
methods.docstring: Multiple MEDIA tags in current turn should be deduplicated.

functions.name: extract_media_tags_fixed
functions.docstring:
Extract MEDIA tags from tool results, but ONLY from new messages
(those added after history_len). This is the fixed behavior.

Args:
    result_messages: Full list of messages including history + new
    history_len: Length of history before this turn
    
Returns:
    Tuple of (media_tags list, has_voice_directive bool)

functions.name: extract_media_tags_broken
functions.docstring:
The BROKEN behavior: extract MEDIA tags from ALL messages including history.
This causes TTS voice messages to accumulate and be re-sent on every reply.
